title: senecio ruiz-lealii
intro: Senecio ruiz-lealii, also known as "Cabeza de Fruto," is a plant species native to the Andes mountain range in South America. It is a shrubby perennial plant used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and reducing inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Senecio ruiz-lealii typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the leaves, stems, and roots of the plant.
